title: Problem with negating IN expression in FILTER
key_bug_features: Negating IN expression in FILTER returns incorrect results
bug_feature_seed: SPARQL PREFIX vocab: <http://example.com/vocab#> INSERT DATA { GRAPH <http://test.graph/> { <http://example.com/Book/1> a vocab:Book ; vocab:title "Book 1" . } };
SPARQL PREFIX vocab: <http://example.com/vocab#> SELECT ?me ?title FROM <http://test.graph/> WHERE { ?me vocab:title ?title };
SPARQL PREFIX vocab: <http://example.com/vocab#> SELECT ?me ?title (DATATYPE(?title) AS ?dt) FROM <http://test.graph/> WHERE { ?me vocab:title ?title };

SPARQL PREFIX vocab: <http://example.com/vocab#> SELECT ?me ?title FROM <http://test.graph/> WHERE { ?me vocab:title ?title FILTER (!(DATATYPE(?title) IN (<http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#string>, <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#float>))) };

SPARQL PREFIX vocab: <http://example.com/vocab#> SELECT ?me ?title FROM <http://test.graph/> WHERE { ?me vocab:title ?title FILTER (!(DATATYPE(?title) IN (<http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#string>))) };
SPARQL PREFIX vocab: <http://example.com/vocab#> SELECT ?me ?title FROM <http://test.graph/> WHERE { ?me vocab:title ?title FILTER (!(?title IN ("Book 1", "Book 2"))) };
SPARQL PREFIX vocab: <http://example.com/vocab#> SELECT ?me ?title FROM <http://test.graph/> WHERE { ?me vocab:title ?title FILTER (!(?title IN ("Book 1"))) };
SPARQL PREFIX vocab: <http://example.com/vocab#> SELECT ?me ?title FROM <http://test.graph/> WHERE { ?me vocab:title ?title FILTER (?title != "Book 1" && ?title != "Book 2") };
SPARQL PREFIX vocab: <http://example.com/vocab#> SELECT ?me ?title FROM <http://test.graph/> WHERE { ?me vocab:title ?title FILTER (?title != "Book 1") };
